name: Aurora | League of Legends
description:
Amidst the icy winds and jagged peaks of the Freljord, you stumble upon a strange and captivating figure — a Vastayan witch that claims to be able to speak with the spirits of the dead.

Update: we got new lore! I added some of it.

Art by jibriart on twitter

From League of Legends
